heading: Considerations
body:
To use the `count` option over sharded collections, your cluster must
run MongoDB 7.0 or later. On sharded clusters running
MongoDB 7.2.0, [$searchMeta](pipe.$searchMeta) might return an error for
`count`.

MongoDB Search doesn't include the `count` results in the results for
queries run with `count` in [explain](explain-ref) mode.
